// Before your call

Come ready.

  • Block out about 45 minutes - we go deep on this.
  • Be somewhere quiet with good wifi - and camera on, please.
  • If someone else is in on the decision, get them on too.
  • Have your rough numbers handy - leads a month, what a job's worth to you.
  • Accept the calendar invite - check your inbox and hit accept so it doesn't get buried.

These are from clients and brands we've run marketing for across ecommerce, info and local business. Every screenshot is pulled straight from the platform. Results depend on your market, offer and spend.
